description: Style NoteSpecially engineered to offer maximum performance and exemplary comfort, these socks from puma make for a great buy for those who never compromise on style and luxury. There's no better way to enjoy comfortable feet than with this pack that contains three pairs of socks in white, grey and black.Product Details Set of three pairs of socks in grey, black and white Minimal seams on toe for abrasion-free wearDouble layered elasticated mouth for a comfortable wearBranding at the ankle Material and Care78% Cotton 22% Nylon Machine washWash dark colours separately
